mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.store, r.mainBarcode, r.qty, r.vip, r.vipLocation, r.uploadDate, r.updateDate, c.product, c.location FROM FIXED_RETURN r JOIN FIXED_CATEGORY c ON r.store = c.store AND r.mainBarcode = c.mainBarcode WHERE r.store = #{store} AND r.uploadDate = #{uploadDate} ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.location IS NULL OR c.location = '' OR c.location = '시즌아웃' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CAST(c.location AS UNSIGNED), c.location
SELECT MAX(uploadDate) FROM FIXED_RETURN WHERE store = #{store}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FIXED_RETURN (store, mainBarcode, qty, vip, vipLocation, uploadDate, updateDate) VALUES (#{store}, #{mainBarcode}, #{qty}, #{vip}, #{vipLocation}, #{uploadDate}, now())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM FIXED_RETURN WHERE store = #{store} AND uploadDate = #{uploadDate}
